issue: Catastral auto-fill: multiple useEffect race condition overwrote autofilled value
text: Three related bugs investigated and fixed. (1) The auto-fill effect in EnergyCertificateSection.tsx read only extractedData.referenciaCatastral, but when a user manually corrects the catastral in the IBI step it goes into manualCorrections.referenciaCatastral. Fix: read manualCorrections first, fall back to extractedData. (2) cadastralReference was a validated required field in validateEcStep (frontend) and isEcDataComplete (backend), blocking form navigation and completion when no IBI was uploaded. Fix: removed it from both validation functions. (3) ROOT CAUSE of catastral never persisting (ELT20260024 had IBI catastral extracted but EC cadastralReference='') — TWO separate useEffects both called onChange({ ...data, ... }) on mount using a stale snapshot of 'data' from render 1. Effect 1 (autofill) set cadastralReference; Effect 2 (soldProduct default) spread stale 'data' (where cadastralReference='') and set soldProduct, overwriting the autofill. React batches state from effects in the same flush; the last setEnergyCertificate call wins. Fix: merged both useEffects into ONE combined effect making a single atomic onChange call. Deps include all three: manualCorrections.referenciaCatastral, extractedData.referenciaCatastral, and project.productType.
